'''Yuul''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] ensign assigned to the engineering staff onboard the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] during the blockade of the [[Murgo Choke]].

[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Yuul became one of the only surviving members of the engineering staff when the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] launched its attack against the ships of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]]. Yuul reported to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu|Bwua'tu]] that [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Urbok]] and [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Reo]] had been killed by [[Gorog]] assassins, while Lieutenant [[Aramb]] had been paralyzed by their venom. Yuul presumed the Admiral himself would oversee engineering, but instead Bwua'tu gave Yuul an instant promotion. Captain Yuul returned to the engineering station to find out the condition of the ''Ackbar''.
